_comment: Copy to integrations.json (gitignored) or set env vars — see docs/ROADMAP.md and README.md (Ops & growth section).

planhub.notes: Most teams export CSV from the portal — use scripts/lead_pipeline.py import (see config/lead_pipeline.example.json). API sync when vendor docs + key are available.

crm.notes: scripts/crm_cli.py for local pipeline stages; scripts/crm_webhook.py POSTs JSON to Zapier / Airtable / internal API.

email.notes: scripts/email_proposal.py (attach file), scripts/render_outbound_email.py (CRM templates), scripts/email_sequence.py (multi-step drafts)

analytics.ga4_notes: Export Traffic acquisition CSV from GA4; scripts/analytics_ingest.py ga-csv. Link UTMs to leads via crm_cli utm or analytics_ingest lead-utm.
